mapper.select: SELECT rfd.role_id, rfd.dir_id, rfd.can_view, rfd.can_download, rfd.can_upload, rfd.can_delete FROM sys_role_file_dir rfd INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rfd.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_file_dir fd ON rfd.dir_id = fd.dir_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND fd.path = #{path} LIMIT 1

SELECT rfd.role_id, rfd.dir_id, rfd.can_view, rfd.can_download, rfd.can_upload, rfd.can_delete, fd.dir_name, fd.path FROM sys_role_file_dir rfd INNER JOIN sys_file_dir fd ON rfd.dir_id = fd.dir_id WHERE rfd.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_file_dir (role_id, dir_id, can_view, can_download, can_upload, can_delete) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{dirId}, #{canView}, #{canDownload}, #{canUpload}, #{canDelete})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_role_file_dir WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND dir_id = #{dirId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_role_file_dir WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND dir_id = #{dirId}
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
